Module org.kink_lang.kink

Package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itreeoptimize

package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itreeoptimize
Provides optimizers of itrees.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itreeoptimize.ssafy
    Conversion of an itree to SSA - Static Single Assignment - form.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ArgsPassingOptimizer
    Converts expression like [:X :Y] <- \args to ArgsPassingItree.
    AssignmentOptimizer
    Optimizes a mcall like X <- Y to AssignmentItree.
    BaseOptimizer
    Base class for optimizing visitors.
    BiArithmeticInliner
    Optimizes bi arithmetic operations to BiArithmeticItree..
    BranchInliner
    Applies inlining of calls of branch in the form below.
    BranchWithElseInliner
    Applies inlining of calls of branch in the form below.
    ContentPropagator
    Propagates the content of local var in its dereference.
    DeadLstoreEliminator
    Eliminates lstore to unused lvars.
    DeparenOptimizer
    Reduces a one step seq to an expression, removing the parentheses.
    EliminateUnusedOptimizer
    Eliminates unused code from a seq.
    FlattenSeqOptimizer
    Flattens a seq recursively.
    FunMcallToSymcallOptimizer
    Converts method call of Fun.call to symcall.
    IfInliner
    Inlining optimizer of preloaded if.
    ItreeOptimizers
    A class to provide the optimizer of itrees.
    LderefOptimizer
    Optimizes \binding.Data to Data.
    LetRecChainer
    Unifies consequent letrec into a single letrec.
    LetRecProducer
    Converts :foo <- { ,,, } to letrec.
    LetRecReducer
    Remove assignment from letrec if the lvar is not used.
    LetSymcallInliner
    Inlining optimizer of a let clause on the tail context.
    LstoreOptimizer
    Optimizer from :Val <- 42 to an LSTORE itree.
    MinusConstantFolder
    Applies constant folding for expressions in the form - NUM_CONST.
    NestedArgsPassingOptimizer
    Converts expression like [:X :Y] <- \args to ArgsPassingItree.
    NestedVecAssignmentInliner
    Inlining of assignment in the form [:X [:Y :Z]] <- Rhs.
    OptRestVecAssignmentOptimizer
    Optimizes [:A :B :C.opt :D.opt :Rest.rest] <- xxx to OptRestVecAssignmentItree.
    OptVecAssignmentOptimizer
    Optimizes assignment in the form [:A :B :C.opt :D.opt] <- xxx.
    ParenContOptimizer
    Optimizer which puts the continuation of a seq into the seq.
    RecursiveOptimizer
    A recursive composite optimizer.
    RepetitiveOptimizer
    Composite optimizer which applies the component optimizers until it reaches the fixed point.
    RestVecAssignmentOptimizer
    Optimizes [:Rest.rest] <- xxx to RestVecAssignmentItree.
    SimpleNewValInliner
    Optimizes invocation in the form new_val('X' x 'Y' y).
    SsafyOptimizer
    Converts a fun to SSA form if possible.
    StoreOptimizer
    Optimizer from B:X <- 42 to a STORE itree.
    TemplateArgsPassingOptimizer<S extends ItreeWithRhs,D extends Itree>
    Converts an assignment to args passing.
    TraitNewValOptimizer
    Converts expression like new_val(... Trait 'X' 10 'Y' 20) to TraitNewValItree.
    UnnestArgsPassingOptimizer
    Converts nested args passing to unnested one.
    VarrefVecAssignmentInliner
    Optimizes an assignment in the form [X:Foo Y:Bar] <- Rhs to VarrefVecAssignmentItree.
    VarrefVecAssignmentToLocalOptimizer
    Optimizes a VarrefVecAssignmentItree to a better form.
